name: test_bulk_adding_psd
description:
Test: PSDS can be bulk added for children in a session.
Steps:
1. Import two children into a session.
2. Record online consent for the two children.
3. Add PSDs in the session to all eligible children.
Verification:
- The PSDs appear for each child.
descriptionHtml:
Test: PSDS can be bulk added for children in a session.
Steps:

  1. Import two children into a session.
  2. Record online consent for the two children.
  3. Add PSDs in the session to all eligible children.
    Verification:
  • The PSDs appear for each child.
statusMessage:
AssertionError: Locator expected to contain text 'PSD added' Actual value: BATES, Clive (known as PrefFirst1 PrefLast1) Date of birth7 November 2012 (aged 12)Year groupYear 8, 8T5PSD statusPSD not added Call log: - Expect "to_contain_text" with timeout 5000ms - waiting for locator("div.nhsuk-card.app-card.app-card--compact:has(h4:has-text(\"BATES, Clive\"))") 9 × locator resolved to
…
- unexpected value " BATES, Clive (known as PrefFirst1 PrefLast1) Date of birth7 November 2012 (aged 12)Year groupYear 8, 8T5PSD statusPSD not added "
statusTrace:
flu_consent_url = '/consents/a4vfO41C2B/flu/start' setup_session_with_two_children = 'ABC123' sessions_page = schools = {'HPV': [School(name='Homewood School and Sixth Form Centre', urn='137484', site=None), School(name="The Coopers' Comp... [School(name='The Norwood School', urn='100624', site=None), School(name='Furness Academy', urn='135940', site=None)]} children = {'HPV': [Child(first_name='Maria', last_name='HILL', nhs_number='9818217527', address=('Flat 6', 'Paula rapid', 'New R...='abigail96@example.net'), Parent(full_name='Amanda Smith', relationship='Mum', email_address='ebrown@example.net')))]} dashboard_page = online_consent_page = start_page = def test_bulk_adding_psd( flu_consent_url, setup_session_with_two_children, sessions_page, schools, children, dashboard_page, online_consent_page, start_page, ): """ Test: PSDS can be bulk added for children in a session. Steps: 1. Import two children into a session. 2. Record online consent for the two children. 3. Add PSDs in the session to all eligible children. Verification: - The PSDs appear for each child. """ school = schools[Programme.FLU][0] for child in children[Programme.FLU]: online_consent_page.go_to_url(flu_consent_url) start_page.start() online_consent_page.fill_details( child, child.parents[0], schools[Programme.FLU] ) online_consent_page.agree_to_flu_vaccination(consent_option=ConsentOption.BOTH) online_consent_page.fill_address_details(*child.address) online_consent_page.answer_health_questions( online_consent_page.get_number_of_health_questions_for_flu( ConsentOption.BOTH ), yes_to_health_questions=False, ) online_consent_page.click_confirm() online_consent_page.check_final_consent_message( child, programmes=[Programme.FLU], yes_to_health_questions=False, consent_option=ConsentOption.BOTH, ) dashboard_page.navigate() dashboard_page.click_sessions() sessions_page.click_session_for_programme_group(school, Programme.FLU) sessions_page.click_edit_session() sessions_page.click_change_psd() sessions_page.answer_whether_psd_should_be_enabled("Yes") sessions_page.click_continue_button() sessions_page.click_save_changes() sessions_page.click_psds_tab() sessions_page.click_add_new_psds() sessions_page.click_yes_add_psds() for child in children[Programme.FLU]: sessions_page.search_for(str(child)) > sessions_page.check_child_has_psd(child) tests/test_psd.py:198: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ self = child = Child(first_name='Clive', last_name='BATES', nhs_number='9708749745', address=('Studio 30A', 'Jones ramp', 'East Mandy...ise@example.net'), Parent(full_name='Mrs Jill Holden', relationship='Mum', email_address='timothyfoster@example.net'))) def check_child_has_psd(self, child: Child) -> None: patient_card = self.page.locator( f'div.nhsuk-card.app-card.app-card--compact:has(h4:has-text("{child!s}"))' ) > expect(patient_card).to_contain_text("PSD added") E AssertionError: Locator expected to contain text 'PSD added' E Actual value: E E BATES, Clive (known as PrefFirst1 PrefLast1) E E E E E E E Date of birth7 November 2012 (aged 12)Year groupYear 8, 8T5PSD statusPSD not added E E E E E Call log: E - Expect "to_contain_text" with timeout 5000ms E - waiting for locator("div.nhsuk-card.app-card.app-card--compact:has(h4:has-text(\"BATES, Clive\"))") E 9 × locator resolved to
…
E - unexpected value " E E BATES, Clive (known as PrefFirst1 PrefLast1) E E E E E E E Date of birth7 November 2012 (aged 12)Year groupYear 8, 8T5PSD statusPSD not added E E E E " mavis/test/pages/sessions.py:993: AssertionError

testStage.description:

Steps:
1. Import two children into a session.
2. Record online consent for the two children.

Verification:
